topic: E-signature for employment contracts — three signatures across two countries, end-to-end in one platform
format: Open with the specific operational problem, then show how one SmartPRO Hub feature addresses it end-to-end
post:
Three signatures. Two countries. One employment contract that had to be signed, filed, and stored before the new hire's visa application could move forward.

The HR manager had the candidate in India, the department head in Dubai, and the GM in Muscat. The old process: print, scan, email, follow up on WhatsApp, get back a blurry PDF, repeat.

Four days. For three signatures.

SmartPRO Hub's e-signature workflow handles this in a single flow. Send the contract to all parties at once, see exactly who's signed and who hasn't, and store the completed document directly against the employee record. No chasing. No version confusion. No missing attachments.

The moment the last signature lands, the contract is ready to attach to the work permit application.

We built this because HR managers in Oman and the GCC shouldn't be coordinating paperwork across WhatsApp threads. The contract workflow connects directly to visa tracking and HR records — everything in one place, bilingual Arabic and English.

If your onboarding process still involves a printer and a prayer, take a closer look.

Book a 30-minute demo: https://www.thesmartpro.io/demo?utm_source=linkedin&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=feature-spotlight
